title: Beehiiv vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv vs Klaviyo. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
intro: Beehiiv and Klaviyo are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter creators and publishers seeking monetization options, while Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce marketing automation. Understanding their key differences will help you choose the right tool for your business.
choose_a_if: You run a newsletter or media publication and want monetization opportunities
You need to support up to 2,500 free subscribers without upgrading
You value a newer, more modern platform interface focused on creator economics
choose_b_if: You operate an e-commerce store on Shopify, WooCommerce, or similar platforms
You need advanced marketing automation with predictive analytics and SMS capabilities
You require comprehensive customer reviews and loyalty features for product-based businesses

faq.a: Neither is universally better—they excel in different areas. Beehiiv is superior for newsletter publishers with its monetization features and larger free tier, while Klaviyo dominates e-commerce marketing with advanced automation and native Shopify integration. Your choice depends on your specific business model.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Klaviyo?
faq.a: Beehiiv offers a better free tier with 2,500 subscribers compared to Klaviyo's 500, making it more accessible initially. Paid plans start at $39 for Beehiiv versus $45 for Klaviyo, giving Beehiiv a slight pricing advantage at entry level.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your subscriber lists and email data between platforms, though the process may require manual work depending on your data structure. Most email platforms support CSV exports and imports, making transitions feasible, though workflow automation rules typically need to be recreated manually.
